prerequisites: A Sharetribe marketplace with access to Sharetribe Console at console.sharetribe.com.
An Integration API application created in Console under Build > Applications, which provides the client_id and client_secret.
A start_date marking the earliest point from which to sync marketplace data.

authMethods.name: OAuth2 client_credentials (Integration API application)
authMethods.summary: Sharetribe's Authentication API is based on OAuth2. The Integration API requires both the client_id and the client_secret; the client_credentials grant against the token endpoint (https://flex-api.sharetribe.com/v1/auth/token) issues an integration access token plus a refresh token. Provide client_id and client_secret in the connector config; oauth_access_token (and oauth_token_expiry_date) hold the issued bearer token, which is sent as 'Authorization: bearer ACCESS_TOKEN' on each request.

setupSteps.title: Create an Integration API application in Console
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Sharetribe Console at console.sharetribe.com for your marketplace. Go to Build > Applications and add a new application. Give it a name and choose 'Integration API' as the API type. On creation, Console displays the client ID and client secret for the application. Copy both, and keep the client secret secure; never expose it to untrusted devices or end-user browsers.

setupSteps.title: Provide client_id and client_secret
setupSteps.body: Enter the application's client ID into the client_id field and the client secret into the client_secret field. These are the credentials the connector uses to authenticate via the OAuth2 client_credentials grant against the Sharetribe token endpoint (https://flex-api.sharetribe.com/v1/auth/token).

setupSteps.title: Optionally supply an existing access token
setupSteps.body: If you already hold a valid integration access token, set it in the oauth_access_token field and its expiry in oauth_token_expiry_date. Otherwise leave these empty; the connector obtains an access token (and a refresh token) from client_id and client_secret using the client_credentials grant, and the token is sent as 'Authorization: bearer ACCESS_TOKEN'.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the earliest date from which marketplace data should be synced. This field is required and bounds the initial extraction window.

sources.title: Sharetribe Authentication API (OAuth2, grant types, token endpoint)
Getting started with the Integration API (create application, client ID and secret in Console)
